place_name: Surrey Hills Grocer - Woodleigh Mall (Pet Friendly)
notes: Official Woodleigh outlet menu images list current item names and descriptions but do not show prices, so prices are set to null.

items.name: Triple Truffle Fries
items.description: Fries coated with truffle powder, truffle olive oil and parmesan.

items.name: Chicken Katsu Caesar Salad
items.description: Baby gem lettuce with anchovy garlic dressing, bacon, egg and chicken katsu.

items.name: Lava Wagyu Burger
items.description: Wagyu beef patty with house sauce, caramelised onion and brioche bun.

items.name: Baked Barramundi Mediterranean Style
items.description: Barramundi with olives, tomatoes, dill and parsley.

items.name: Pork Belly Benny
items.description: Fried pork belly with lava eggs, mustard and hollandaise on sourdough.

items.name: Poke Smoked Salmon Toast
items.description: Smoked salmon, diced avocado, cherry tomato and shoyu dressing on sourdough.

items.name: Classic Stack
items.description: Three pancakes with vanilla creme chantilly, whipped butter and maple syrup.

items.name: Wagyu Curry Pasta
items.description: Wagyu mince in Japanese curry with penne and furikake bread crumbs.

notes: Official Serangoon Garden day menu PDF. Prices are before prevailing GST and service charge; menu notes dietary abbreviations such as VG, V, GF, GFOA, DF and CN.

items.name: Organic Acai Bowl
items.description: Acai bowl with granola, banana, strawberry, mango and coconut.

items.name: Homemade Granola Bowl
items.description: Greek yoghurt with seasonal fruits and honey.

items.name: Aussie Breakfast Platter
items.description: Eggs, beans, portobello, tomato, pork sausage, bacon and sourdough.

items.name: Vegan Breakfast Platter
items.description: Portobello, kale, tempeh, beans, tomato, avocado and sourdough.

items.name: Smoked Salmon Bagel
items.description: Smoked salmon with avocado, cucumber, dill cream cheese and capers.

items.name: Chilli Crab Pasta
items.description: Spaghetti with crab meat, chilli crab base, fried mantou and coriander salad.

items.name: Mushroom Medley Aglio Olio Orecchiette
items.description: Orecchiette with mushrooms, asparagus, garlic, sun-dried tomato and chilli flakes.

items.name: Steak Frites
items.description: Australian grass-fed striploin steak with salt and shoestring fries.

notes: Official Flock Cafe menu page lists item names, descriptions and SGD prices. Representative items selected across breakfast, classics, pasta, waffles and drinks.

items.name: Big Breakfast
items.description: Eggs with baked beans, sausage, bacon, potatoes, onions, mushrooms and sourdough.

items.name: Flock House Salad
items.description: Avocado couscous, tomatoes, roasted garlic, almond, granola and mesclun.

items.name: Chicken Katsu Burger
items.description: Chicken katsu burger with cheddar, slaw, tomato, lettuce and cajun fries.

items.name: Pork Cheek Rigatoni
items.description: Rigatoni with braised pork cheek, grated parmesan and basil.

items.name: Prawn Linguini (Soup Base)
items.description: Linguini with prawns, dried shrimps, spring onion and chilli padi.

items.name: Five Cheese Pizza
items.description: Pizza with five cheeses, tomato sauce, nuts and raisins.

items.name: Summer Waffles
items.description: Waffles with vanilla or tiramisu ice cream, Nutella, honey and almond flakes.

items.name: Ice Banana Caramel Latte
items.description: Iced latte with banana and caramel flavour.

notes: Official Cafe Melba site confirms the Mediapolis outlet but does not expose a text menu in the crawled page. Representative priced items are from the Cafe Melba Mediapolis Deliveroo menu; official outlet page cross-check: https://www.cafemelba.com.sg/cafe-melba-fudebar-menu.

items.name: Battered Fish and Chips
items.description: Battered fish with homemade tartar, pickled red onion and herbs.

items.name: Chicken Parmigiana
items.description: Panko-crusted chicken breast with tomato sauce, mozzarella, fries and salad.

items.name: Classic Cheeseburger
items.description: Australian wagyu beef patty with vegetables, burger sauce, pickle and fries.

items.name: A Nod to Japan
items.description: Sushi rice with oyster mushroom, avocado, cucumber, tofu and seaweed.

items.name: Caesar Salad
items.description: Romaine lettuce with croutons, parmesan, egg and bacon bits.

items.name: Beef Bolognese
items.description: Pasta with Australian minced beef, tomato sauce and grana padano.

items.name: Truffle Mushroom
items.description: Pizza with truffle sauce, mozzarella, portobello, rocket and parmesan.

items.name: Smashed Avo Toast
items.description: Sourdough with poached eggs, cherry tomato, dukkah, feta and pomegranate.
